included_primary_ids: string; work item ids sorted ascending; primary records only
overdue_primary_ids: string; overdue primary work item ids sorted ascending
escalation_queue_ids: string; overdue primary ids in escalation order
missing_owner_ids: string; included primary ids with no owner, sorted ascending

duplicate_ids: string; duplicate work item ids sorted ascending

sla_breach_rate: number rounded to exactly 3 decimal places
